failures.files: CNGBdb/CNSA file URLs live under https://ftp.cngb.org/pub/CNSA/data<N>/CNP0001543/ where the data<N> shard (data1..data9) is only exposed via the project page's JavaScript. Browse to https://db.cngb.org/search/project/CNP0001543/ manually to find the shard, then fetch the FTP listing.
